calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Giovanni Zocca.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:18:33 p.m. and concluding at 2:56:05 p.m.

Christopher Nedeau Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Columbus Stockton Vallejo LLC. a California Limited Liability Company.
Defendant Giovanni Zocca not appearing.

SIMON WONG is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents brief recitation of case and offer of proof.
SIMON WONG is examined by the Court.

Plaintiff Columbus Stockton Vallejo LLC. a California Limited Liability Company submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: Lease agreement for 401 Columbus Avenue
Exhibit B: Commercial Lease agreement for 658 Vallejo Street
Exhibit C: 3 Day Notice to Quit for 401 Columbus Avenue
Exhibit D: Tenant Ledgar
Exhibit E: 3 Day Notice to Quit for 658 Vallejo Street
Exhibit F: Ledgar of money owed

Plaintiff's counsel makes oral motion to dismiss Doe Defendants.
Plaintiff's oral motion is GRANTEED by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Columbus Stockton Vallejo LLC. a California Limited Liability Company and against Defendant Giovanni Zocca.

Plaintiff Columbus Stockton Vallejo LLC. a California Limited Liability Company is awarded judgment against Defendant Giovanni Zocca as follows:

Damages/Principal: $61,575.78
Total Judgment: $61,575.78

Counsel for Plaintiff to prepare and submit proposed judgment for review and signature. (D505)
